title: draba subglabrata
intro: Draba subglabrata, also known as the glabrous draba or hairy draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba subglabrata include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Draba subglabrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including colds and respiratory issues.
